description: DWDI elliptical shot: small-bore tube side elevation, gamma source above offset along the pipe axis (AXIAL OFFSET arrow to the weld plane), beam fans through both walls to a flat film; source-side weld lands displaced, film-side near plumb; radiograph inset opens the weld into an ellipse (FILM SIDE / SOURCE SIDE limbs), end-view badge 2 SHOTS @ 90.
